---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
# Projects 

[Signature work that demonstrates the intersection of nutrition science, operations, and education.]{.page-subtitle}
:::

::: {.content-area}

::: {style="margin-bottom:2rem;color:var(--mid);font-size:0.97rem;max-width:680px;"}
Each project below reflects a deliberate effort to solve a real-world challenge, whether improving athlete performance, supporting vulnerable populations, or advancing nutrition care in community settings.
:::

---

## Featured Projects

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.project-card-header style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--terra),var(--terra-light));"}
:::
::: {.project-card-body}
[Sports Nutrition & Education]{.project-tag}
### Gymnast Pre-Competition Nutrition Workshop

A structured educational program designed to equip competitive gymnasts with the nutritional knowledge required to optimise training and competition performance. The workshop addressed a critical gap: many young athletes were training on empty calories or inadequate fuelling strategies, leading to performance dips and recovery issues.

**Key outcomes:**
- Delivered to gymnasts aged 12–18 in Louveira, SP, Brazil
- Covered glycogen loading, hydration, and meal timing relative to competition schedules
- Partnered with coaches to align dietary guidance with training periodisation plans
- Produced a take-home reference card athletes could use independently

**Approach:** Used interactive demonstrations, food models, and Q&A sessions to make evidence-based nutrition approachable for young athletes and their families.
:::
::: {.project-card-footer}
📅 July 2023 &nbsp;·&nbsp; 📍 Louveira, SP, Brazil &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🏷 Clinical · Education · Sports
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.project-card-header style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--sage-dark),var(--sage));"}
:::
::: {.project-card-body}
[Clinical Nutrition · Neonatal Care]{.project-tag}
### Human Milk Bank — Hospital Practicum

A clinical immersion in one of the most specialised areas of nutrition care: supporting neonatal patients and new mothers through evidence-based human milk banking. This practicum at Hospital Geral Vila Penteado placed me at the intersection of clinical science, food safety, and compassionate patient support.

**Key outcomes:**
- Managed the full milk banking lifecycle: collection, pasteurisation, quality checks, and NICU delivery
- Provided direct breastfeeding education and emotional support to postpartum mothers
- Applied food safety protocols (temperature control, labelling, contamination prevention) in a critical clinical environment
- Gained understanding of neonatal nutrition needs and the long-term health outcomes tied to human milk feeding

**Approach:** Collaborated with a multidisciplinary team including neonatologists, nurses, and social workers, ensuring each mother received personalised, evidence-based guidance.
:::
::: {.project-card-footer}
📅 2009 (3 months) &nbsp;·&nbsp; 📍 São Paulo, Brazil &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🏷 Clinical · NICU · Food Safety
:::
:::

::: {.project-card style="grid-column: 1 / -1;"}
::: {.project-card-header style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--sage),var(--sage-light));"}
:::
::: {.project-card-body}
[Community Health · Clinical]{.project-tag}
### Clinical Nutrition for Underserved Populations

Delivered nutrition assessment and counselling services to low-income community members through São Camilo University's community school clinic. This project addressed the gap in access to professional nutrition care for populations who could not otherwise afford it.

**Key outcomes:**
- Conducted anthropometric assessments and bioimpedance analyses for 40+ patients
- Developed personalised nutritional care plans addressing chronic conditions, malnutrition, and weight management
- Educated patients on affordable, culturally appropriate dietary changes
- Contributed to a team report documenting community nutrition patterns and barriers to healthy eating

**Approach:** Used motivational interviewing techniques and culturally sensitive communication to build trust and support long-term dietary behaviour change.
:::
::: {.project-card-footer}
📅 2009 (3 months) &nbsp;·&nbsp; 📍 São Paulo, Brazil &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🏷 Community · Clinical · Equity
:::
:::

:::

:::
